  • Constructor Details

    • RiskModel

      protected RiskModel()
      This is the constructor for the org.atlanmod.risk.RiskModel object.

  • Method Details

    • addPropertyChangeListener

      public void addPropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener listener)

    • quitGame

      protected void quitGame()
      This method handles exiting the game.

    • setPlayerCount

      protected void setPlayerCount(int playerCount)
      Sets the number of players.
      Parameters:
      playerCount - is an integer input by the player in the org.atlanmod.risk.PlayerCountDialog GUI.

    • getPlayerCount

      protected int getPlayerCount()
      Gets the number of players.
      Returns:
      the number of players in the org.atlanmod.risk.Risk game.

    • initializeGame

      public boolean initializeGame(ArrayList<String> playerNames, ArrayList<String> playerTypes) throws FileNotFoundException
      Sets up the org.atlanmod.risk.Risk game.
      Parameters:
      playerNames - is an ArrayList of the player names.
      playerTypes - is an ArrayList of the player teams.
      Returns:
      true if the game was successfully initialized
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException

    • startGame

      protected void startGame()
      Starts the game and prints out welcome messages.

    • turnInCards

      protected void turnInCards(int[] cardsToRemove)
      Handles turning in org.atlanmod.risk.Risk cards.
      Parameters:
      cardsToRemove - is an integer array of the indexes of cards to be removed.

    • reinforce

      protected void reinforce(String countryAName)
      Handles placing reinforcements.
      Parameters:
      countryAName - is a String of the country in which the reinforcements will be placed

    • attack

      protected void attack(String countryAName, String countryBName)
      Handles the attack function. Attacking allows the player to engage in battles, with outcomes decided by RNG, with opposing players in order to lower the number of armies in a territory to 0 in order to occupy it.
      Parameters:
      countryAName - is a String of the point A country.
      countryBName - is a String of the point B country.

    • fortify

      protected void fortify(String countryAName, String countryBName)
      Handles the fortify function. Fortifying allows the player to move armies from one country to another occupied country once per turn.
      Parameters:
      countryAName - is a String of the point A country.
      countryBName - is a String of the point B country.

    • nextPlayer

      protected void nextPlayer()
      Handles turn transitions in both the deploy phase and game phase.

    • turnAI

      protected void turnAI()
      Handles the AI's use of the game functions.

    • getCardsList

      protected ArrayList<String> getCardsList()
      Creates and returns the information for the cardsList in the org.atlanmod.risk.BoardView.
      Returns:
      a list of Strings to be displayed in the cardsList.

    • getCountryAList

      protected ArrayList<String> getCountryAList()
      Creates and returns the information for the countryAList in the org.atlanmod.risk.BoardView.
      Returns:
      a list of Strings to be displayed in the countryAList.

    • getCountryBList

      protected ArrayList<String> getCountryBList()
      Creates and returns the information for the countryBList in the org.atlanmod.risk.BoardView.
      Returns:
      a list of Strings to be displayed in the countryBList.

    • setCountryASelection

      protected void setCountryASelection(String country)
      Receives information on which country is selected in countryAList.
      Parameters:
      country - String of the selected country

    • getBoard

      protected Board getBoard()
